art.summary: March 22, 2026: Shift toward Art Basel Hong Kong (starts March 27) and NY auction previews; continued interest in ocean-stewardship art for World Water Day post-event analysis.
art.notable: Market preparing for Basel; focus remains on institutional programming for spring.

market.summary: Markets closed for the weekend; equity markets remain under pressure (-6.8% from Jan highs). Ongoing geopolitical volatility and high bond yields continue to dominate weekend analysis. S&P 500 closed at 6506.54.

stats.Outlook: High volatility maintained; monitoring energy supply chain developments.
